modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble printing specific pages from the academic catalog in Firefox.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to print a couple of pages from the 2022-2023 catalog. I got the psychology checklist, but then it just kept printing blank pages. It’s super frustrating!
